title: CottageCraft Blocks
description: Adds lots of coloured Blocks & Variants from 2 types of coloured Wood between smooth and pastel, coloured Glow Lichen & Sculk Vein
body:
# CottageCraft Blocks A Mod created for the [CottageCraft Modpack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/cottagecraft) & SMP, adding coloured Variants of Blocks including, Wood, Washed (Pastel) Wood, Froglights, Glowstone, Shroomlights, Glow Lichen, Sculk Vein, Mushrooms & Water. You can join the [CottageCraft Discord](https://discord.gg/gR8v49Thx8) Server for any issues/questions ## Current Features **Dye Colours = Black, Blue, Brown, Cyan, Green, Grey, Light Blue, Light Grey, Lime, Orange, Magenta, Pink, Purple, Red, White & Yellow

Block Family = Button, Slab, Stairs, Wall, Fence, Fence Gate & Pressure Plate** --- - 17 Water Blocks (Dye Colours) + Custom Rainbow Water

- 384 Mushroom Blocks - 16 Dome (Red Mushroom Variant) with Block Family (Dye Colours + Custom Sculk Variant) - 16 Flat (Brown Mushroom Variant) with Block Family (Dye Colours + Custom Sculk Variant)

- 16 Glow Lichens (Dye Colours)

- 16 Sculk Veins (Dye Colours)

- 16 Moss Blocks (Dye Colours) with Block Family - Includes 16 Carpets

- 146 Froglight Blocks (Dye Colours) with Block Family

- 90 Coral Blocks (Dye Colours) - Includes 'renewable coral' with Coral Duplication through crafting - 63 Iron Blocks (Exposed, Weathered, Rusted) with Block Family

- 864 Coloured Wood Blocks (Dye Colours) with Block Family + Doors/Trapdoors - Includes Custom Sapling/Trees

- 828 Washed Wood Blocks (Dye Colours) with Block Family + Doors/Trapdoors

- 306 Light Blocks (Shroomlights, Froglights, Glowstone - Dye Colours) with Block Family

- 20 Decorative Glass Blocks & Panes - 2 Frog Variants - Grove Frog - Breed Frogs in Grove - Lush Frog - Breed in Lush Cave

- 17 Flowers - 3 Workstations - Woodwork Bench - Works like Stonecutter but for Wood, only way to obtain Washed Wood (Integrates with [REI](https://modrinth.com/mod/rei)) - Florist Bench - Insert any flower to convert it to a CottageCraft Flower (Integrates with [REI](https://modrinth.com/mod/rei)) - Glazier Crafts Bench - Insert any Stained Glass/Panes to get Decorative Glass/Panes (Integrates with [REI](https://modrinth.com/mod/rei))

## Requirements Requires [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) *Feel free to use this mod in other modpacks but keep the download within the Modrinth Ecosystem and do not reupload* --- *All textures besides Iron are done by me, Iron textures are from https://github.com/Lemonszz/rusty-iron*
